pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Update Hibernate dependencies to use the new org.hibernate.orm groupId and version 6.4.x required for Jakarta EE 10 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old groupId org.hibernate is deprecated/removed in Hibernate 6, and Hibernate 6 is required for Jakarta EE 10 (Spring Boot 3.x) compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Hibernate Spatial dependencies to use the new org.hibernate.orm groupId and version 6.4.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old groupId org.hibernate is deprecated/removed in Hibernate 6, and Hibernate 6 is required for Jakarta EE 10 (Spring Boot 3.x) compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Jackson JAX-RS XML provider with the Jakarta namespace variant.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old jackson-jaxrs-xml-provider uses javax.ws.rs annotations which are removed in Jakarta EE 10; the new artifact uses jakarta.ws.rs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Mail API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Jakarta Mail API is no longer provided by default in the same way or needs explicit declaration for Jakarta EE 10 compliance in Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta WS RS API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Jakarta WS RS API is required for Jakarta EE 10 compliance and may not be transitively available or sufficient from other dependencies in Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove exclusions for JUnit 4 and JUnit Vintage engine from spring-boot-starter-test.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and JUnit 5 are the standard; JUnit 4/Vintage support is often removed or discouraged, and explicit exclusions are no longer needed or desired.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/chouett.general_idea: Remove redundant @Autowired annotation from constructor parameter as constructor injection is the default in Spring Boot.
Use pattern matching for instanceof to simplify exception handling logic.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/chouett.after: throwable -> throwable instanceof WebClientResponseException wcre && wcre.getStatusCode().is5xxServerError();

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/excepti.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/excepti.why_exists: javax.ws.rs classes are no longer available on the classpath in Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE environments, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol).

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/filter/.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/filter/.why_exists: javax.ws.rs classes are not present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing compilation errors due to missing packages.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
Replace deprecated Locale constructor with the new Locale.of factory method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.why_exists: The Locale(String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21; while it may still compile, using the deprecated API is discouraged and future-proofing requires migration to the new factory method.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+, which moved all javax.* packages to jakarta.*. Using javax.ws.rs will result in ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors.
